title: ContainerPoolNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-container-pool-rs: request/result fanout plus per-pool event and heartbeat subjects derived from pool slug. Per-language defaults are seeded in remote/databases/pg/seeds/container-pool-app-config.sql.

subjects.name: ContainerPoolRequests
subjects.description: Generic container pool request subject (legacy default; specific pools usually use ContainerPoolLanguageRequests with their own runtime prefix).
subjects.subject: dd.remote.container_pool.requests

subjects.name: ContainerPoolLanguageRequests
subjects.description: Per-runtime pool request subject (e.g. nodejs, rust, golang, dart, gleamlang, erlang). Seeded by container-pool-app-config.

params.name: language
params.description: Runtime token: nodejs | rust | golang | dart | gleamlang | erlang.

subjects.name: ContainerPoolEvents
subjects.description: Per-pool event subject (built from pool slug at runtime).

subjects.name: ContainerPoolHeartbeats
subjects.description: Per-pool heartbeat subject (built from pool slug at runtime).
